description: Employee time tracking with kiosk, PIN/QR auth, and payroll export

subdomains.name: time
subdomains.emergencyNote: Staff-only emergency access. Kiosk mode does NOT work over emergency access — service workers require HTTPS. Wall-mounted kiosks must use the primary domain or Tailscale.

optional.name: LLM_ENDPOINT
optional.doc: OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL; auto-detected if Vibe-GLM-OCR is enabled

firstLogin.note: First-boot setup wizard at /setup creates the SuperAdmin and the firm-internal company in a single transaction. Gated on appliance_settings.installation_id and the absence of any super_admin row history. Once stamped, the setup endpoint refuses to run again — if the operator needs to reset, they must reset the database. The wizard pre-fills the company name from FIRM_NAME when set.

kiosk.stableUrlGuidance: Wall-mounted kiosks must use the primary domain or Tailscale URL — service workers and PWA install both require HTTPS, so emergency :5192 access does not work for kiosk tablets. Document the chosen URL in CREDENTIALS.txt under 'Kiosk URL' for the customer's records. The kiosk URL takes the form `<base>/kiosk?location=<id>` where `<id>` is the kiosk-device row issued at pairing time.

workers.note: BullMQ-backed background jobs. The api container runs WORKER_ROLE=scheduler; the worker container runs WORKER_ROLE=worker. /api/v1/health reports per-queue heartbeat status under .data.workers.
